message:
test(stream): B10 wave 4 invariant tests for forward, zip, watch_stream

forward: into_sink_creates_sink_stream, forward_sends_all_items,
forward_empty_stream_ok. zip: zip_both_empty_returns_none, zip_accessors.
watch_stream: watch_stream_terminates_after_sender_drop.
